data.title: Travel + Leisure Co. Completes $325 Million Term Securitization
data.description: Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL) from Orlando, Florida, has successfully finalized a term securitization deal by issuing $325 million in asset-backed notes. These notes carry a weighted average coupon of 5.11%, and the transaction had an advance rate of 98.00%. Erik Hoag, the Chief Financial Officer of Travel + Leisure Co., highlighted that this achievement showcases the company's stable platform and its capacity to secure capital even in challenging market conditions.

data.title: SLB Announces Dates for First-Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: Houston-based company SLB, listed on NYSE as SLB, is set to conduct a conference call on April 24, 2026. This discussion will cover the performance results of the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The call is scheduled to commence at 11:00 a.m. US Eastern Time, with a corresponding press release scheduled for 7:00 a.m. US Eastern Time on the same day. Interested parties can join the conference call by contacting the Conference Call Operator at +1 (833) 470-1428 within North America, or +1 (404) 975-4839 outside North America.

data.title: LearnUpon Launches Create+, Bringing AI-Native Content Authoring Directly Into Its LMS
data.description: Dublin-based LearnUpon, a prominent Learning Management System (LMS) provider, unveiled the integration of AI-native content authoring into its platform called Create+. This move comes after the acquisition of Courseau, an AI learning creation platform, in November 2025. The introduction of Create+ signifies a substantial advancement in enabling quicker and more streamlined course development for contemporary businesses. By tackling a key obstacle in learning and development processes, this integration is set to revolutionize the industry.

data.title: WP Engine Announces DE{CODE} 2026: Shape What’s Next
data.description: In Austin, Texas, WP Engine, a leading web enablement company specializing in WordPress®, has revealed that registration for DE{CODE} 2026, their seventh yearly conference, is now live. This event will bring together numerous developers, marketers, and digital experts to explore the impact of AI on web design, development, and discovery. The free virtual conference is scheduled for May 6 in North America and EMEA, with on-demand viewing options becoming available starting May 7.

data.title: SecureSpace Self Storage Opens SecureSpace Tukwila in the Seattle, WA MSA
data.description: In Redondo Beach, California, on March 26, 2026, SecureSpace Self Storage launched its latest facility at 5950 Southcenter Boulevard in Tukwila, Washington. As a prominent self-storage provider operating in various urban areas in the United States, this establishment represents SecureSpace's 14th location.

data.title: Wells Fargo Reaches Major Digital Milestones
data.description: In San Francisco, Wells Fargo revealed key achievements in its digital evolution, highlighting the increasing popularity of its mobile banking platform and AI-driven virtual assistant, Fargo®. Fargo has successfully assisted customers in over 1 billion interactions within three years of its introduction. Moreover, the company recently surpassed 33 million active users on its mobile app. These milestones showcase the extensive reach and reliability of Wells Fargo's digital services, demonstrating the trust of millions of customers.

data.title: PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes Partners with Provalus to Expand Career Opportunities for Veterans and Military Families
data.description: In Tysons, Virginia on March 26, 2026, the PenFed Foundation for Military Heroes revealed a recent partnership with Provalus. The collaboration aims to provide career opportunities for veterans and military families in rural communities lacking resources. This initiative seeks to address the unemployment rate among veterans, which currently stands at 4.5% according to recent reports. The partnership is expected to impact over 500 veterans and military family members, offering them pathways to sustainable employment and financial stability.

data.title: United Reaches New Agreement with Association of Flight Attendants
data.description: In Chicago on March 26, 2026, United Airlines and the Association of Flight Attendants-CWA revealed a proposed agreement offering enhanced benefits to United's 30,000 flight attendants. The deal includes top-tier salaries, improved scheduling, and various other upgrades, pending ratification.

data.title: Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions Facilitates Sale of Lexus of Warwick in Rhode Island
data.description: In a recent transaction, Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions facilitated the acquisition of Lexus of Warwick from Penske Automotive Group on behalf of Rob McGee. As part of the McGee Automotive Family's expanding multi-state portfolio, the store will retain its name as Lexus of Warwick. This deal highlights Pinnacle's successful partnership with Rob McGee and signifies the continued growth of the McGee Automotive Family.

data.title: LiveOnNY Launches Targeted Public Service Campaign to Increase Organ Donor Registration Across New York
data.description: A new campaign was launched on New York Mets Opening Day, spreading statewide to tackle the existing gap between the demand for organ donations and the number of registered donors. LiveOnNY, the organ procurement organization for the New York metropolitan area, is leading the initiative. This campaign aims to increase organ donor registration numbers in New York State and address the critical need for donors. The campaign started on March 26, 2026, and will target a wide audience to promote awareness and encourage more individuals to register as organ donors. With the initiative expanding across the state, the goal is to significantly boost the number of registered organ donors in New York.

data.title: Everstar Announces Collaboration with DOE, National Laboratories, and Microsoft -- Marking Its First Major Milestone in the Genesis Mission
data.description: Everstar has revealed its partnership with the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE), Idaho National Laboratory (INL), Argonne National Laboratory (ANL), and Microsoft in connection with the DOE's Genesis Mission on March 26, 2026. This collaboration is set to be instrumental in Everstar's involvement in this key initiative.

data.title: Meta Stock Slides As Court Losses Bring 'Big Tobacco Moment' Comparisons
data.description: Shares of Meta plummeted as consecutive court defeats caused speculation likening the situation to social media's equivalent of the infamous "Big Tobacco moment." The decline in Meta stock was highlighted in a recent article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: This AI Builder Is At A Pivotal Chart Level With Earnings Due
data.description: Argan experienced a significant growth surge primarily due to the rapid construction of data centers for artificial intelligence tasks. The company is currently at a crucial chart level, with earnings on the horizon.

data.title: ASML Stock Called 'Top Pick' As Memory-Chip Makers Upgrade Gear
data.description: An expert analyst recently labeled ASML stock as a "top pick," noting the semiconductor equipment leader's advantage from memory chip companies acquiring new equipment. This endorsement comes as memory-chip firms ramp up their gear upgrades. The favorable forecast boosts ASML's position in the market, positioning it as a promising investment opportunity.

data.title: Arm Holdings Stock Sees Relative Strength Rating Jump To 87
data.description: Arm Holdings' American Depository Receipt (ADR) has reached an impressive Relative Strength Rating exceeding 80, specifically hitting 87. This significant jump in the rating demonstrates strong performance for the stock in comparison to the broader market.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Vensure Employer Solutions/
data.description: Vensure Employer Solutions has raised a significant $450 million investment from Stone Point to boost their M&A and AI innovation efforts. This update was announced by the company on 23-Mar-2026.
